creator: bauerm@pestilenz.org
text:
Dear committers,

> Please note that PR ports/124536 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

I approve the patch. I suggest to make the submitter of the
patch the new maintainer of math/ntl, since I no longer have
resources do the job properly.

Best regards,

Matthias Bauer
